validation_results.code_quality: High. The logic is cleanly separated into snapshotting and delta computation methods, and the implementation is fully covered by new unit tests.
edge_cases_covered: Baseline files correctly excluded from delta

rationale: The Player implemented the per-task git delta logic across both task-work and direct mode paths, added observability logging, and provided a comprehensive suite of unit tests that verify the correctness of the delta computation. All acceptance criteria are satisfied.
